description:
Forward POST requests to UniFi applications using RESTful HTTP methods.

Request Flow: The request is proxied through api.ui.com cloud endpoint to the remote console at http://127.0.0.1/proxy/[path] with POST method.

Requirements:
- Console firmware version must >= 5.0.3
- For non-organization API keys: Limited to API key owner's consoles only (cannot access other admins' consoles)
- For organization API keys: Can access any console within the organization

API Documentation:
- Network API: https://developer.ui.com/network
- Protect API: https://developer.ui.com/protect

Response: On success, the upstream API response is passed through directly. On error, a standardized error schema is returned.

pathParameters.name: id
pathParameters.description: Host ID to proxy the request to

local.python:
import http.client
import json


conn = http.client.HTTPSConnection("api.ui.com")
payload = json.dumps({
  "action": "AUTHORIZE_GUEST_ACCESS"
})
headers = {
  'Accept': 'application/json',
  'X-API-Key': '<X-API-Key>',
  'Content-Type': 'application/json'
}
conn.request("POST", "/v1/connector/consoles/{id}/*path", payload, headers)
res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()
print(data.decode("utf-8"))
local.ansible:
- name: Connector - POST
  ubiquiti.unifi_api.network:
    path: "/v1/connector/consoles/{id}/*path"
    method: POST
    body:
      action: AUTHORIZE_GUEST_ACCESS
  register: result


- debug:
    var: result.data

remote.python:
import http.client
import json


conn = http.client.HTTPSConnection("api.ui.com")
payload = json.dumps({
  "action": "AUTHORIZE_GUEST_ACCESS"
})
headers = {
  'Accept': 'application/json',
  'X-API-Key': '<X-API-Key>',
  'Content-Type': 'application/json'
}
conn.request("POST", "/v1/connector/consoles/{id}/*path", payload, headers)
res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()
print(data.decode("utf-8"))
remote.ansible:
- name: Connector - POST
  ubiquiti.unifi_api.network:
    path: "/v1/connector/consoles/{id}/*path"
    method: POST
    body:
      action: AUTHORIZE_GUEST_ACCESS
  register: result


- debug:
    var: result.data
